task-auth-001.description: Add Supabase dependency and environment config
acceptanceCriteria: package.json includes @supabase/supabase-js ^2.x
.env.example documents VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
vite config exposes env vars to client
IAuthService interface exports signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods
AuthResult type includes user, session, error fields
AuthSession type matches Supabase session shape
No runtime imports in types.ts (pure type definitions)
Creates Supabase client with env config
signUp calls supabase.auth.signUp and returns AuthResult
signIn calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword and returns AuthResult
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession returns current session or null
onAuthStateChange wraps supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange and returns unsubscribe function
Implements full IAuthService interface
Stores users in memory map
signUp adds user to map, returns success
signIn validates against stored users
onAuthStateChange fires callbacks on state changes
Exposes reset() method for test cleanup

task-auth-005.description: Create MST AuthStore with sync actions
acceptanceCriteria: Uses supabase-auth schema to generate MST model
AuthState has status, userId, email, expiresAt, errorCode, errorMessage fields
Actions: setAuthenticated, setUnauthenticated, setLoading, setError, reset
Computed views: isAuthenticated, isLoading, user (derived object)
AuthProvider accepts authService prop (IAuthService)
Creates AuthStore via useRef (stable across renders)
Subscribes to authService.onAuthStateChange in useEffect
Cleans up subscription on unmount
useAuth hook returns store state and service methods
Session persists across page reloads via Supabase SDK
Renders children when status is authenticated
Redirects to /login when status is unauthenticated
Shows loading indicator when status is idle or loading
Uses Navigate from react-router-dom for redirects
Email and password inputs with labels
Validates email format and password presence before submit
Calls authService.signIn on submit
Displays error message from AuthState.errorMessage
Disables form during loading state
Link to signup page
Email and password inputs with labels
Password confirmation field
Validates email format, password length (min 8), password match
Calls authService.signUp on submit
Shows success message about email confirmation
Displays error message from AuthState.errorMessage
Link to login page
LoginPage renders LoginForm centered on page
SignupPage renders SignupForm centered on page
Both pages redirect to / if already authenticated
Routes added to app router: /login, /signup
